headings: 15. What is a 'Service Area' or 'Neighborhood of the project'?
text: 'Service area' or the 'neighborhood of the project' means an area within one mile of the Section 3 project or, if fewer than 5,000 people live within one mile of a Section 3 project, within a circle centered on the Section 3 project that is sufficient to encompass a population of 5,000 people according to the most recent U.S. Census.
